data.content: Implementation already present on main (commit 2129bcf). Verified: all 495 tests pass, make sanity green, 95.07% coverage. Feature includes: plan_state_transition with TerminalCascadeApprovalRequired error, collect_descendants with depth-sorted safe ordering, cascade_terminal_state_locked with StateCascadeMetadata audit (cascade_approved + cascade_root_id), CLI --cascade-terminal-descendants flag on state/update/next commands, and comprehensive unit + CLI integration tests.
